title: access audit
description: view and audit all access memberships across users and groups

info.title: access audit overview
info.description: the Access Audit page provides a comprehensive view of all memberships in your organization. Use this page to review and audit user and group access permissions.

memberships.title: memberships
memberships.text: view all access grants linking users or groups to organizations with specific roles

users.title: user access
users.text: filter by user to see all organizations and roles assigned to a specific user

groups.title: group access
groups.text: filter by group to see all organizations and roles assigned to a specific group

scope.title: access scope
scope.text: understand scope: 'local' applies to the org only, 'recursive' includes all child organizations

empty.title: no memberships found
empty.description: there are no memberships matching your filters. Try adjusting the filters or check if memberships have been created.
